browserNote: playwright-chrome unavailable; preferred browser for CyberSource cross-origin iframe tests. Running on playwright-edge — cross-origin iframe assertions may have reduced coverage.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Payment Section Visible in Cart
testCases.notes: PAYMENT DETAILS section present on /cart. Payment method dropdown visible. CyberSource (Bank card - CyberSource) pre-selected as payment method.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Payment Method Dropdown Options
testCases.notes: Payment method dropdown shows 5 options: Bank card (Authorize.Net), Bank card (CyberSource), Bank card (Datatrans), Pay with points, Bank card (Skyflow). CyberSource option present and selectable. Verified in CHK-006.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Microform iFrames Load
testCases.notes: Selecting 'Bank card (CyberSource)': 2 iframes load from testflex.cybersource.com/microform/bundle/v2.0.2/. Card number iframe (credit card input) and CVV iframe (security code input) both present. Verified in CHK-006 and SEC-PCI-001/002 area.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Card Number iFrame Domain
testCases.notes: Card number iframe src: testflex.cybersource.com/microform/bundle/v2.0.2/. Hosted by CyberSource domain, not storefront. Cross-origin iframe isolation for PCI scope.

testCases.title: CyberSource — CVV iFrame Domain
testCases.notes: CVV iframe also from testflex.cybersource.com domain. Same origin as card number iframe — CyberSource-hosted. Both microforms use testflex subdomain (test environment).

testCases.title: CyberSource — iFrame Cross-Origin Isolation (SEC-PCI-001)
testCases.notes: iFrames from testflex.cybersource.com are cross-origin — cannot read iframe content from JavaScript (cross-origin restriction). Card data never touches storefront domain. PCI scope isolation verified architecturally.

testCases.title: CyberSource — No Card Data in Browser Storage
testCases.notes: localStorage and sessionStorage inspected (23 keys): no card numbers, CVV, or PAN data stored. Verified in SEC-PCI-005. CyberSource microform keeps card data in CyberSource domain only.

testCases.title: CyberSource — HTTPS Enforcement for Payment
testCases.notes: Both storefront (vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com) and microform (testflex.cybersource.com) use HTTPS. window.location.protocol='https:'. Transport encryption enforced for entire payment flow. Verified in SEC-PCI-006.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Payment Form Visible Before Place Order
testCases.notes: CyberSource iframes visible on /cart BEFORE clicking Place Order (unlike Authorize.Net/Skyflow which redirect to /checkout/payment). Payment form embedded in single-page checkout. Per project memory: CyberSource shows payment form directly on cart page.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Place Order Disabled Until Card Data Entered
testCases.notes: PLACE ORDER button shows 'Complete all required information to proceed.' with CyberSource iframes visible but empty. Card microforms must be filled before order placement enabled. Standard checkout validation.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Billing Address Selector for CyberSource
testCases.notes: Billing address* field present and required when CyberSource selected. 'Please select a billing address' placeholder. Same billing address selector as other payment methods.

testCases.title: CyberSource — CVV Visual Masking
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: CVV iframe present from testflex.cybersource.com but cannot access iframe content from JavaScript (cross-origin). Cannot verify masking behavior directly. Architectural isolation confirmed (SEC-PCI-003 equivalent).

testCases.title: CyberSource — Card Number Visual Masking
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Card number iframe from testflex.cybersource.com cross-origin — cannot inspect input masking. Microform design ensures masking. Cannot automate cross-origin iframe assertion.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Place Order with Test Card (CYBERSOURCE_VISA)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: CYBERSOURCE_VISA test card not configured in environment. Cannot enter card data into CyberSource microform iframes. Order placement blocked by missing payment credentials.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Order Confirmation After Payment
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Cannot complete CyberSource payment without test card. Order confirmation page not reachable.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Payment Decline Handling
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Decline flow requires entering test decline card into CyberSource microform. Not possible without CYBERSOURCE_VISA configuration.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Network Request: No Card Data to Storefront API
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Verifying network requests don't contain card data requires HAR analysis during actual payment attempt. Cannot initiate payment without test card credentials.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Saved Credit Cards
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Testing saved credit card management (/account — 'Saved credit cards' menu item visible for B2B org user) requires payment completion to save card. Deferred.

testCases.title: CyberSource — CyberSource vs Other Payment Methods
testCases.notes: CyberSource uniquely shows iframes on /cart (embedded). Authorize.Net, Skyflow, Datatrans, Manual redirect to /checkout/payment after 'Place Order'. Per project memory (payment-flow): CyberSource is the exception that shows form directly on cart page.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Browser Compatibility (Edge vs Chrome)
testCases.notes: CyberSource microform iframes load correctly on Edge. iframes from testflex.cybersource.com render. Note: preferredBrowser for this suite is playwright-chrome (per manifest). Edge fallback used — cross-origin iframe behavior consistent between browsers for this assertion scope.

testCases.title: CyberSource — Payment Section After Address Selection
testCases.notes: After selecting shipping address (verified in CHK-003), payment section loads CyberSource iframes. Payment section visible alongside shipping section in single-page checkout.

testCases.title: CyberSource — ApolloError Does Not Block Payment Loading
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: ApolloError: 'addOrUpdateCartShipment' appears in console (BUG-042-001) but CyberSource iframes load successfully. Separate verification of payment + ApolloError interaction deferred.

infrastructureIssues.description: CyberSource suite requires playwright-chrome (per manifest) for cross-origin iframe access tests. Chrome not installed — ran on Edge. Cross-origin iframe content assertions not available on either browser (same-origin policy).
infrastructureIssues.impact: Reduced iframe content verification coverage. Architectural isolation verified. Functional microform load verified on Edge.
